name: hololive Treasure Mountain
short_description: Stack the Love of Captain Marine! A Simple yet Exciting 3D Physics Puzzle Game!
detailed_description:
Stack the Love of Captain Marine!

Hololive members transform into adorable treasures!

Stack the 3D Hololive characters without letting them overflow to create your very own mountain in this must-play 3D puzzle game for Hololive fans!

How to Play

Just toss the treasures and stack them on the island!

Combine identical treasures to transform them into larger ones!

The game ends when a treasure falls off the island!

Create bigger treasures and make consecutive combinations to boost your score through chain reactions!

And when you create the largest treasure, something amazing happens…!?

Treasure Exchange

The treasures that appear in the game can be swapped with other members!

Customize to your liking and create your own unique mountain of favorite characters!

Rankings

Compete with players from around the world and test your skills.

Aim for the high score and keep challenging yourself!

This game is a participant in the indie game brand ""holo Indie"" (※2), developed by CCMC Inc. (※1.).

It has been approved for distribution and monetization under the guidelines and regulations of ""holo Indie"".

Please note that the monetization of derivative games using content owned by Cover Corporation outside of ""holo Indie"" is not permitted.

※1. About CCMC Corp.

CCMC Corp. is entrusted with website management (ex: steam) including, examination, publishing and other necessary tasks by Cover Corp.

※2. About ""holo Indie""

holo Indie's objective is to cooperate with hololive production fans and creators.

It is a game brand that offers ""Game Creator Support Program"" for the derivative work games.

For more details about ""holo Indie"", Please refer to the Cover Corp.'s ""Derivative work guidelines"".
